Localization.Description: Single Sign-On (SSO) user and group management

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} changed the password of the Single Sign-On (SSO) user {object.account.name} on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created the Single Sign-On (SSO) user {object.account.name} on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created the Single Sign-On (SSO) user group "{object.name}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} added users to the Single Sign-On (SSO) group "{object.name}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} updated the Single Sign-On (SSO) user {object.account.name} on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} added user groups to the Single Sign-On (SSO) group "{object.name}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} enabled the Single Sign-On (SSO) user {object.account.name} on vCenter host {event_src.host}
Event from Single Sign-On (SSO) on vCenter host {event_src.host}: {reason}
The user {subject.account.name} removed users or groups from the Single Sign-On (SSO) user group "{object.name}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed the Single Sign-On (SSO) user {object.account.name} on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} disabled the Single Sign-On (SSO) user {object.account.name} on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} changed the description of the Single Sign-On (SSO) user group "{object.name}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
